message:
fix(resize): use BTreeMap for panes to ensure deterministic scheduling

Replace HashMap<u64, PaneState> with BTreeMap<u64, PaneState> in
ResizeScheduler. HashMap iteration order is nondeterministic, which
caused collect_candidates() to produce candidates in varying order.
While candidates are sorted afterward, domain budget partitioning
and lifecycle event emission still depended on iteration order,
breaking the determinism proptest.

BTreeMap iterates in sorted key order, guaranteeing deterministic
scheduling decisions for the same input sequence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
